CLARIN·DARIAH / UK
PROGRAMME SPEAKERS VENUE ABOUT REGISTER
BRIGHTON, UK  //  02.10.2026

About the event

Bringing together researchers, academics, and museum & library professionals to shape the digital and physical infrastructures that underpin research.

Why we're meeting

Edit this section in about.md. A short introduction to the event's purpose: the shared systems, data, tools and partnerships that research depends on, and why the community is gathering in Brighton to strengthen them.

Themes

01
Digital infrastructure
Placeholder — tools, data services and platforms for research.
02
Collections & access
Placeholder — libraries, museums, archives and open access.
03
Policy & partnership
Placeholder — funding, sustainability and cross-sector collaboration.

Who it's for

Researchers & academics Libraries & museums UKRI & research councils UK policymakers European colleagues
ORGANISED BY
University of Brighton
University of Oxford
